name: Sorbet with Almond Oranges
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle orange slices with mango juice and toss well.
2. Chill.
3. Drain slices and arrange in overlapping fan pattern on plates.
4. Add scoops of sorbet to plate and garnish with mint.
5. Serve immediately. You may substitute orange juice for mango juice if desired.
